creator: jcoffm@outlook.com
text:
Created attachment 199224
Update byobu to 5.127.

I'd like to maintain this port, if approved.

Files REMOVED:
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_battery
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_cpu__count
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_cpu__freq
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_cpu__temp
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_ec2__cost
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_entropy
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_fan__speed
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_ip__address
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_load__average
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_memory
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_network
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_processes
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_raid
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_rcs__cost
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_reboot__required
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_swap
files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_uptime

These individual patches were replaced with a find/replace in the Makefile. Only one (files/patch-usr_lib_byobu_disk) needs to remain.
